productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Lifestyle White Casual Shoes
description: These slip-on ballerina flats from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the sneaker design. This simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.UpperPatent leather uppers mixed with coloured panels for comfort and styleElasticated straps on the front for added comfortSoft fabric lining for added comfortSynthetic footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelGrooved floral design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
